title: Checkpoint
description: Structured snapshot saved by the `claw-compactor` plugin when an opencode session crosses the 100k-token compaction boundary. One file per checkpoint: opencode+/opencode_claw/.compactor/sessions/<session_id>/checkpoint.<seq>.json. Append-only within a session (seq monotonically increases). HARD invariant: every element of tools_found / prospects / a2a_acp MUST cite at least one `path:line` evidence anchor — mirrors the rule from compaction-action.schema.json.

session_id.description: Opaque opencode session id (matches the path component sessions/<session_id>/).

seq.description: Monotonically increasing checkpoint index within this session. Computed as max(existing checkpoint.<n>.json) + 1.

ts.description: RFC 3339 timestamp with timezone offset when the checkpoint was written.

tokens_before.description: Approximate input token count observed at the moment opencode triggered compaction (usually > 100000 for context=262144 models with reserved=162144).

agent.description: Which agent was active when compaction fired. Plugin only writes checkpoints when agent ∈ config.agents.

tools_found.description: Tools confirmed in this session leg (mcp servers, lsp adapters, scripts). Each entry MUST have ≥1 path:line evidence anchor. Merged append-only into knowledge/tool-catalog.json by `mergeAppend`.

kind.description: Tool category — same vocabulary as integration-record.schema.json `type`.

source.description: Primary path:line where this tool was discovered, e.g. `compose.searchbox.yml:14`.

prospects.description: Could-be-tools — files/configs that look like undiscovered tools but lack confirmation. Each has a confidence score in [0,1]. Merged append-only into knowledge/prospect-index.json.

why_could_be_tool.description: One-line justification — must reference what makes this look like a tool surface.

score.description: Confidence in the prospect being a real tool. 0 = noise, 1 = confirmed.

a2a_acp.description: Discovered Agent-to-Agent (A2A) / Agent Coordination Protocol (ACP) endpoints. Merged append-only into knowledge/a2a-acp-index.json.

endpoint.description: URL, unix socket, or `docker exec -i ... <cmd>` style invocation.

agent_card_url.description: Optional URL of the published agent card.

plan_ref.description: Repo-relative path to the continuation plan written alongside this checkpoint.

summary.description: ≤500-char human summary of what was discovered in this session leg.
